commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
This is the comfort of all martyrs. (Bristow)
This the support of every Christian under the severest trials of either mind or body: this the sweetener of every burthen and cross.

commentaries.author: Tertullian of Carthage
commentaries.content: -not the Father at His own. He is seen by Stephen, at his martyrdom by stoning, still sitting at the right hand of God
